Off Calendar May-26-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Continued To May-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Deb Fox, Esq., for and with Herb Thomas, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers oral argument that the presumption in Probate Code Sec. 6124 should not apply as decedent suffered significant cognitive impairments prior to her death, was not competent, and did not possess her original will at the time of her death. The court determines that it is satisfied with counsel's argument and asks if there are any parties present who object to the instant petition. No objections are presented. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated April 8, 2016, is admitted to Probate. Herb Thomas is appointed executor of decedent's will with full IAEA authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order is executed in open court. A Status of closing the estate is set for February 24, 2026. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of status report is filed two weeks prior the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
